author: doll-agent
content: Added copy/ascontiguousarray/asfortranarray/asanyarray/asarray_chkfinite/require to ferray-core::creation. Owned arrays in ferray are always C-contiguous, so the layout-coercion variants degenerate to clone()-with-doc; asarray_chkfinite errors on NaN/Inf for floats. Re-exported at top level via ferray crate. Tests in ferray-core::creation cover all variants.
